reason: All FR-09 acceptance criteria are fully met. The StructuredLogger emits NDJSON (one JSON object per line via print+json.dumps), includes all required fields (timestamp in ISO 8601 UTC with 'Z' suffix, level, service, message), supports all five levels (DEBUG/INFO/WARN/ERROR/CRITICAL) via dedicated shorthand methods, and kwargs are merged into the entry dict as additional fields. Docstrings correctly document INFO for business events, WARN for non-fatal anomalies, and ERROR for fatal errors. Tests verify valid JSON output, single-line NDJSON format, and required field presence. No regressions observed.
